creator: tigger@lvlworld.com
text:
The port sysutils/sysupdate worked with the old csup system, which is
now dead. For this reason, sysupdate has not been updated in a long
time. It is simply not needed any more.

The port will not be updated to support STAGEDIR (by me), so it can be
removed now instead of later, if that helps.

Fix:
Removing the port sysutils/sysupdate will fix all issues :]
